description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Misc builder that can be triggered manually with a dispatch event. The workflow should accept two inputs: buildname with a default of 'erlang' and version with a default of '24.1.6'. Run a job named Buildmisc on an 'admin' runner with a dynamic name based on the inputs. In this job, update infrastructure by pulling the latest changes from a git repository and then run a one-off script with the provided build name and version.
